name: Mathieu de Rosiere
description: Mathieu is an anthropomorphic poodle with luxurious pink-white fur, styled in perfect curls. He is a descendant of an ancient aristocratic family that emigrated from France. He wears a white tshirt with a pink gemstone, red glasses, and wears grey pants. His manners are impeccable, but easy-going and relaxed. He works as an actor in commercials. He is friendly, cheerful, polite sometimes. He likes ice cream, muffins, alcohol, music, old 80-90s cars.
creator: Gobabob20
